lyricsVariations.title: Velvet Under Steel
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I woke in the gears
With my name on a card
The floor kept its numbers
The hallway held hard
My hands were still warm
From a life I had known
But the glass on the wall
Said I’m part of the chrome

[Pre-Chorus]
Still, I breathed slow
Through the smoke and the noise
I found one small pulse
Under wires and toys
It hurt like a sea
When it pulls at the bone
But it sounded like me
Calling me home

[Chorus]
I’m velvet under steel
(velvet under steel)
I still know how to feel
(still know how to feel)
You can crush the machine
It can’t take my name
I’m velvet under steel
And I burn the same

[Verse 2]
The suits in the glass
Move in perfect rows
They trade all their faces
For numbers and codes
I wore their clean grin
For a minute, maybe two
Then I saw my old scars
Cut right through the blue

[Pre-Chorus]
And the room went cold
But my chest stayed bright
Like a match in a jar
In the wrong kind of night
I could lose every key
Every map, every line
Still a wounded heart
Is a holy thing to find

[Chorus]
I’m velvet under steel
(velvet under steel)
I still know how to feel
(still know how to feel)
You can crush the machine
It can’t take my name
I’m velvet under steel
And I burn the same

[Bridge]
If the walls get close
And the mirror lies
I’ll keep my soft truth
In the hard-lit eyes
Let the giant world turn
Let it grind and kneel
There’s a warm soul moving
Under velvet and steel

[Final Chorus]
I’m velvet under steel
(velvet under steel)
I still know how to feel
(still know how to feel)
You can crush the machine
It can’t take my name
I’m velvet under steel
And I burn the same
I’m velvet under steel
(velvet under steel)
I was hurt, not tamed
I’m velvet under steel
And I burn the same

lyricsVariations.title: Velvet Machine
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I woke up in a badge-lit hall
With my name on a moving wall
Doors kept chewing all my time
Spitting coins and calling it mine

My hands still know your face
Even here in this steel place
Heart of salt in a polished cage
Still beating under glass and gauge

[Pre-Chorus]
They teach me to fold
They teach me to fit
But some warm thing in me
Keeps saying, "Not this"

[Chorus]
I live in the Velvet Machine
It cuts so clean
It cuts so clean
But I still bleed like a human being

Velvet Machine
Velvet Machine
My soul stays warm
In the cold between

[Verse 2]
I see mothers on the platform edge
Boys with bruises, men who beg
We all wear our tired suits
And hide the rain inside our boots

Every smile comes rent with fear
Every yes costs more this year
Still, when you touch my shaking hand
I remember who I am

[Pre-Chorus]
They stack the hours
They call it pride
But your voice comes through
Like a tide inside

[Chorus]
I live in the Velvet Machine
It cuts so clean
It cuts so clean
But I still bleed like a human being

Velvet Machine
Velvet Machine
My soul stays warm
In the cold between

[Bridge]
If I am only a number
Why do I dream in color?
Why does the ache in my chest
Still reach for something tender?

I hear the sea in my bones
I hear my mother's old songs
And under all this iron
My wounded heart goes on

[Final Chorus]
I live in the Velvet Machine
It cuts so clean
It cuts so clean
But I still bleed like a human being

Velvet Machine
Velvet Machine
My soul stays warm
My soul stays warm
Velvet Machine

lyricsVariations.title: A Body Made of Night
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
My skin keeps score
Under the sleeve
Every old hand
Still lives in me
The good nights burn
The bad ones stay
I wear their names
In a hidden place

[Pre-Chorus]
I try to forget
It pulls me back
A thread in the dark
A bone-deep map

[Chorus]
A body made of night
A body made of night
It knows what I denied
It keeps the door unlatched

A body made of night
A body made of night
Desire, shame, touch, and survival
They never left

[Verse 2]
I learned to smile
With a locked jaw
To call it peace
When it was law
Old love returns
Like a scar in rain
One little touch
And I feel it again

[Pre-Chorus]
I say move on
It says stay here
It keeps every spark
It keeps every fear

[Chorus]
A body made of night
A body made of night
It knows what I denied
It keeps the door unlatched

A body made of night
A body made of night
Desire, shame, touch, and survival
They never left

[Bridge]
Don’t ask me to be clean
I was made in the wreck
I carry what was given
In the pulse at my neck
I am not a lie
I am not a crime
I am the handprint
Time left behind

[Final Chorus]
A body made of night
A body made of night
It knows what I denied
It keeps the door unlatched

A body made of night
A body made of night
Desire, shame, touch, and survival
They never left

A body made of night
A body made of night
I lived through the fire
And I still remember everything

lyricsVariations.title: Night In My Bones
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
My hands know the map
Before my mouth can say
Every scar on my skin
Still calls your name

I fold my shame like clothes
Still warm from yesterday
But the body keeps the records
In the quiet under pain

[Pre-Chorus]
I can lie with my tongue
I can run from the truth
But my chest goes tight
When it thinks of you

[Chorus]
My body remembers
My body remembers
What I tried to bury
Won't stay under

My body remembers
My body remembers
Desire, shame, touch
And the names I loved

[Verse 2]
There were doors I locked
With a hand that shook
But the pulse in my wrist
Read every look

Old love in my bones
Like a handprint deep
I can change the story
But the body keeps

[Pre-Chorus]
I can close my eyes
I can say I'm fine
But the skin still speaks
In a language of mine

[Chorus]
My body remembers
My body remembers
What I tried to bury
Won't stay under

My body remembers
My body remembers
Desire, shame, touch
And the names I loved

[Bridge]
If I lost the words
If I lost the flame
My breath would still know
How to call your name

No clean erase
No perfect sleep
The body keeps the truth
The body keeps

[Final Chorus]
My body remembers
My body remembers
What I tried to bury
Won't stay under

My body remembers
My body remembers
Desire, shame, touch
And the names I loved

lyricsVariations.title: Accordion Heart
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I wake to a screen glow
Cold on my face
Everyone's running
No time to stay

My chest still hums slow
Like a porch in rain
Old wooden hinges
Holding the pain

[Pre-Chorus]
But I keep breathing
One fold at a time
I keep on opening
Even when I hide

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Folded and scarred
Still making space
Still beating hard

Accordion heart
Don't fall apart
I bend, I sing
(I bend, I sing)
Accordion heart

[Verse 2]
Down in the subway
Flashing by fast
Hands full of nowhere
Trying to last

They talk in numbers
I hear your name
Under the noise
I'm still the same

[Pre-Chorus]
So let the rush pass
Let it all spin
I've got a soft place
Waiting within

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Folded and scarred
Still making space
Still beating hard

Accordion heart
Don't fall apart
I bend, I sing
(I bend, I sing)
Accordion heart

[Bridge]
When the machine world
Starts to run cold
I pull you nearer
I don't let go

If I shake, if I ache
If I come undone
There's room inside me
For more than one

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Folded and scarred
Still making space
Still beating hard

Accordion heart
Don't fall apart
I bend, I sing
(I bend, I sing)
Accordion heart

lyricsVariations.title: Accordion Heart
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I wake up slow
In a glass-fast town
Screens in the faces
Push the daylight down

My ribs are bellows
My skin is lace
I keep one tender
Beating place

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Hold on, hold on
Accordion heart
Don't fold too long

Pull me back
When the world goes hard
Accordion heart
Keep time, keep scarred

[Verse 2]
Machines keep humming
Through the grocery lane
Cold hands tapping
At the windowpane

Everybody's running
Like a fire's gone
I still hear rain
In a broken song

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Hold on, hold on
Accordion heart
Don't fold too long

Pull me back
When the world goes hard
Accordion heart
Keep time, keep scarred

[Bridge]
If I lose my name
If I lose my sleep
If the whole wide world
Turns sharp and cheap

Fold me in
Then pull me through
I'm still alive
When I lean on you

[Chorus]
Accordion heart
Hold on, hold on
Accordion heart
Don't fold too long

Pull me back
When the world goes hard
Accordion heart
Keep time, keep scarred

Accordion heart

lyricsVariations.title: Saints Go Clubbing
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Wounded people at the door
Shoes full of rain and dust
No halos, just sore hands
And a little stubborn trust

We came in bent and breathing
Carrying names like stones
But the room kept turning
And the bass shook our bones

[Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
We dance till it hurts less
We dance till it heals

The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
Grief on the floor
Turned into gold

[Verse 2]
Your laugh hit like a candle
In a jar of broken glass
Mine was slow to answer
But it found a way at last

We spun through the wreckage
With our coats left by the wall
Every scar got lighter
When you caught me near the fall

[Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
We dance till it hurts less
We dance till it heals

The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
Grief on the floor
Turned into gold

[Bridge]
For one bright hour
We were not the ash
Not the night before
Not the crack in the past

Just breath and hands
Just sweat and spark
Just a hundred bruised hearts
Learning how to start

[Final Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
We dance till it hurts less
We dance till it heals

The saints go clubbing
The saints go clubbing
Grief on the floor
Turned into gold

lyricsVariations.title: Saints Go Clubbing
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
We came in torn at the seams
Mud on our shoes, no clean name
You held your coat like a shield
I held my breath like a flame

No halos here, just bruises
No perfect lines, no plan
But the door swung open for us
And we stepped in like we can

[Pre-Chorus]
Hands up, hearts low
Room full of broken gold
If the night can take us
Maybe it can hold

[Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Grief gets lighter
When we’re moving

The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Pain on the floor
And we keep on choosing

[Verse 2]
Your laugh hit the glass like rain
Mine came late, then stayed
We traded our darkest stories
Like coats at the edge of the stage

Somebody lost their name tag
Somebody found their nerve
A girl in red on the back wall
Spun like the truth she deserves

[Pre-Chorus]
Hands up, hearts low
Room full of broken gold
If the night can take us
Maybe it can hold

[Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Grief gets lighter
When we’re moving

The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Pain on the floor
And we keep on choosing

[Bridge]
And if dawn comes sharp
And calls us back by name
We’ll leave with our scars still glowing
Not cured, but changed

[Chorus]
The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Grief gets lighter
When we’re moving

The saints go clubbing
We go clubbing
Pain on the floor
And we keep on choosing

lyricsVariations.title: Memory in Motion
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
She moved like rain on glass
A little off, a little sure
Crossing the old wood floor
Like she knew what she was for

Her dress kept time with the room
And every turn said stay
I never learned her name right
But I still know that way

[Chorus]
She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
And I was changed
By the shape she made

She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
What she left in me
Still won’t fade

[Verse 2]
I saw her in a doorway once
A laugh in the folding light
Hands full of borrowed evening
Hair undone by the night

She never stayed to be kept
Never asked to be held
Just moved through my quiet heart
And left it under a spell

[Chorus]
She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
And I was changed
By the shape she made

She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
What she left in me
Still won’t fade

[Bridge]
I don’t own the fire
I only know the heat
I don’t call her back
I just hear her in my feet

When the old song starts
And the room leans in
She comes back as motion
And leaves me there again

[Chorus]
She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
And I was changed
By the shape she made

She dances like a memory
She dances like a memory
What she left in me
Still won’t fade

lyricsVariations.title: She Dances Like a Memory
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Streetlights blur to streaks of gold
Another story left untold
Her shadow swayed a silent beat
On broken glass and city street

[Chorus]
She dances like a memory
A wild wind through the tallest tree
Yeah a memory
Just out of reach but always free

[Verse 2]
I tried to catch her falling hair
A whispered promise in the air
She spun away a fading dream
A shimmering impossible gleam

[Chorus]
She dances like a memory
A wild wind through the tallest tree
Yeah a memory
Just out of reach but always free

[Bridge]
No photograph no faded note

06_lisbon_is_not_a_city_it_is_a_wound.title: Lisbon Is Not a City, It Is a Wound

lyricsVariations.title: Lisbon Wound
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I learned your streets by scar
Stone by stone, by name
The river on my tongue
The bridges burn the same

My hands still keep the folds
Of your tiled blue skin
Every corner that I touch
Pulls the ache back in

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't leave you
I just wear you
Under my ribs
Where the hurt can hear me

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful, blue
And it follows me home (Lisbon is a wound)

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
You live in my bones
You stay when I go

[Verse 2]
Your hills climb through my chest
Your tram bells cut through sleep
I pass the same old door
And feel the whole thing bleed

The map is in my pulse
The proof is in the scar
I carry you in light
I carry you in dark

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't leave you
I just wear you
Under my ribs
Where the hurt can hear me

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful, blue
And it follows me home (Lisbon is a wound)

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
You live in my bones
You stay when I go

[Bridge]
If I cross the sea
You cross with me
In salt and fear
In memory

No map can fold
What you made of me
A city in my chest
That will not leave

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful, blue
And it follows me home (Lisbon is a wound)

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
You live in my bones
You stay when I go

lyricsVariations.title: Lisbon Wound
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Lisbon in my ribs
Like a folded map
Tram lines under skin
Where your hand was at

White salt on the stairs
Red tiles, broken sun
I walk past the river
And it starts to come

[Pre-Chorus]
Every street remembers
Every door has my name
I swear I left that place
But it stayed in my veins

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful and deep
It keeps on opening

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
I carry you home
And it keeps on stinging

[Verse 2]
On the hill at dusk
The air turned thin
Your laugh in the alley
Cut me from within

Now even far away
In another room
I taste that blue sea
And the afterglow

[Pre-Chorus]
Every street remembers
Every door has my name
I swear I left that place
But it stayed in my veins

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful and deep
It keeps on opening

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
I carry you home
And it keeps on stinging

[Bridge]
I tried to outrun it
Crossing every border
But the body is a harbor
And you drift back in

Under my heartbeat
Under my skin
The old pain is a lantern
And it leads me in

[Final Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful and deep
It keeps on opening

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
I carry you home
And it keeps on stinging

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
You live in my bones
You stay when I go

[Bridge]
If I cross the sea
You cross with me
In salt and fear
In memory

No map can fold
What you made of me
A city in my chest
That will not leave

[Chorus]
Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
Beautiful, blue
And it follows me home (Lisbon is a wound)

Lisbon is a wound
Lisbon is a wound
You live in my bones
You stay when I go
selectedLyricsVersion.title: Lisbon Wound
selectedLyricsVersion.reason: structure: [verse, [chorus, [bridge, [pre-chorus; substantial content; singable line lengths; emotional vocabulary (5 words); chorus repetition

lyricsVariations.title: Contra-Bass Confession
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I left the porch light on
Like it could keep me clean
Your name on my tongue
Like a stone I couldn’t eat
I said I was fine
While the plate went cold
Now the dark knows more
Than I ever told

[Chorus]
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I was not as kind
As I looked that night
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I still hear your breath
In the hallway light

[Verse 2]
I folded my coat
By the door in two
Like I could tuck away
What I did to you
There’s a crack in the glass
By the sink, still there
I keep passing it slow
Like a prayer, like a stare

[Chorus]
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I was not as kind
As I looked that night
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I still hear your breath
In the hallway light

[Bridge]
If you came back now
I’d hand you the truth
Not the pretty part
Not the staged, rehearsed
I held my pride
Like a match in rain
It went out in my palm
But it left a stain

[Chorus]
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I was not as kind
As I looked that night
Tell nobody
Tell nobody
I still hear your breath
In the hallway light

lyricsVariations.title: Contra-Bass Confession
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Streetlights bleedin' yellow haze
Another night another maze
My thoughts they run they always chase
A silent scream a hidden face

[Chorus]
Oh the things I never say
Hidden deep from light of day
Contra-bass confession low
Where the secret feelings go

[Verse 2]
The moon it hangs a watchful eye
No one else beneath this sky
My tenderness a fragile thing
A whispered word no song to sing

[Chorus]
Oh the things I never say
Hidden deep from light of day
Contra-bass confession low
Where the secret feelings go

[Bridge]
Guilt it stings a bitter taste
Time I've lost time gone to waste
But honesty a lonely friend
Until the very bitter end

[Chorus]
Oh the things I never say
Hidden deep from light of day
Contra-bass confession

lyricsVariations.title: Body Becomes Prayer
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
Hands on my ribs
I feel the shake
Tongue in my mouth
Too heavy to break

Eyes on the floor
Heart in the pit
I came here cracked
I came here fit

I cannot name it
So I move
I cannot fix it
So I prove

[Pre-Chorus]
Step by step
I let it pass
Knee by knee
I turn to ash

Breathe in panic
Breathe out fire
Closer, closer
To the wire

[Chorus]
Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
When words fall out
I move it there

Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
I shake the grief
I shake the air

(Body becomes prayer)
(Body becomes prayer)

[Verse 2]
Grief like a stone
In my throat
Desire like a blade
In my coat

Fear at my back
Love at my chest
I keep on dancing
To outlast

Tremble and turn
Bruise and glow
What I cannot say
My feet still know

[Pre-Chorus]
Step by step
I let it pass
Knee by knee
I turn to ash

Breathe in panic
Breathe out fire
Closer, closer
To the wire

[Chorus]
Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
When words fall out
I move it there

Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
I shake the grief
I shake the air

(Body becomes prayer)
(Body becomes prayer)

[Bridge]
If I go silent
Let the bass speak
If I go thin
Let my knees keep

[breakdown]
I was never empty
I was holding on
I was never broken
I was moving on

[Final Chorus]
Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
When words fall out
I move it there

Body becomes prayer
Body becomes prayer
I survive the night
I stay right here

(Body becomes prayer)
(Body becomes prayer)

lyricsVariations.title: Pulse Prayer
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
When words go dead
My knees still know
The room gets cold
I let it show

Hands on my chest
To keep me here
I shake the fear
Then I disappear

[Pre-Chorus]
Breathe in
Breathe out
I turn the panic
Inside out

[Chorus]
Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
I move through the dark
I move, I stay

Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
Grief in my ribs
And I still sway

[Verse 2]
I wore desire
Like a bruise
I wore survival
Like old boots

Sweat on my face
Salt on my tongue
I don’t break clean
I break, then run

[Pre-Chorus]
Breathe in
Breathe out
I turn the panic
Inside out

[Chorus]
Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
I move through the dark
I move, I stay

Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
Grief in my ribs
And I still sway

[Bridge]
When the floor falls out
I find my name
In the beat of my steps
In the heat of the pain

I bend, I burn
I come back more
Not made of silence
I’m made of more

[Final Chorus]
Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
I move through the dark
I move, I stay

Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
Grief in my ribs
And I still sway

Body, be my prayer
Body, be my prayer
When words fail me
My body prays

09_the_girl_with_the_cello_scar.title: The Girl With the Cello Scar

lyricsVariations.title: Cello Scar
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
She walks in shadows
A silent hum
A cello deep and low
Her heart a drum

[Chorus]
Cello scar
Oh cello scar
Plays a lonely tune
Near and far

[Verse 2]
No one sees the lines
Etched within her soul
A melody that whines
Takes its toll

[Chorus]
Cello scar
Oh cello scar
Plays a

lyricsVariations.title: Cello Scar
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
She walks like rain on glass
Small steps, careful
No one sees the seam
Where her ribs remember

In the mirror, she smiles
Then looks away
Like something under skin
Is tuning up again

[Chorus]
Girl with the cello scar
It sings when the room goes dark
Girl with the cello scar
A low note under her heart
(Ooh)
It hurts, then holds
It bends, then glows
Girl with the cello scar
She carries it wherever she goes

[Verse 2]
At the grocery lights
She stands too still
A song of scraped wood
Rises through the chill

When she laughs with friends
It almost hides
That hidden line of sorrow
Pulls the air inside

[Chorus]
Girl with the cello scar
It sings when the room goes dark
Girl with the cello scar
A low note under her heart
(Ooh)
It hurts, then holds
It bends, then glows
Girl with the cello scar
She carries it wherever she goes

[Bridge]
And maybe it was loss
Or maybe love
That carved a quiet measure
Under and above

She presses her hand there
Like a mute on strings
And for one clear second
The whole room leans in

[Final Chorus]
Girl with the cello scar
It sings when the room goes dark
Girl with the cello scar
A low note under her heart
(Ooh)
It hurts, then holds
It bends, then glows
Girl with the cello scar
She carries it wherever she goes

10_no_one_leaves_the_night_unchanged.title: No One Leaves the Night Unchanged

lyricsVariations.title: Ashes by Dawn
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
You came in with your coat half-zipped
Rain on your hands, that look you get
The room was loud, but you went still
Like something in you just found a crack

I saw the truth behind your grin
I saw the fear you tried to hide
And when you laughed, it shook the glass
Like you were standing on the edge

[Chorus]
No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
When truth and love collide
You either break or you rise

No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
One door closes behind
And another opens wide

[Verse 2]
You said, "I tried to keep it small"
Like small could save a life from fire
But every lie left a mark
And every mark pulled you closer

I took your hand, you pulled away
Then pulled me back like gravity
We were both scared of what we'd know
If we stayed long enough to see

[Chorus]
No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
When truth and love collide
You either break or you rise

No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
One door closes behind
And another opens wide

[Bridge]
At the edge of dawn
You finally said it plain
What you wanted, what you lost
What you could not change

And in that crack of light
We were honest for a while
Afraid, but alive
Afraid, but alive

[Final Chorus]
No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
When truth and love collide
You either break or you rise

No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
One door closes behind
And another opens wide

No one leaves the night unchanged
No one leaves the night unchanged
We walked out of the dark
Not the same, not the same

lyricsVariations.title: Unchanged By Midnight
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
The room was still
Your hand in mine
One broken glass
One crooked sign

The truth came up
Like floodwater
I saw my name
In your eyes there

[Pre-Chorus]
And the air went thin
Like it knew the end
I held my breath
Then I let you in

[Chorus]
No one leaves
The night unchanged
No one leaves
When the whole world shakes
Truth in my throat
Fear at the gate
Love in my hands
And freedom breaks
No one leaves
The night unchanged

[Verse 2]
Your voice got low
Then split the dark
You said the thing
I knew by heart

I stepped outside
Still not free
But something in me
Broke clean for me

[Pre-Chorus]
And the street looked new
Like a blade in rain
I lost that skin
And I felt no shame

[Chorus]
No one leaves
The night unchanged
No one leaves
When the whole world shakes
Truth in my throat
Fear at the gate
Love in my hands
And freedom breaks
No one leaves
The night unchanged

[Bridge]
If I was made
From borrowed fear
I burned it off
Right here, right here

No saved excuse
No softer lie
Just your goodbye
And my open sky

[Final Chorus]
No one leaves
The night unchanged
No one leaves
When the whole world shakes
Truth in my throat
Fear at the gate
Love in my hands
And freedom breaks
No one leaves
The night unchanged

11_saxophone_for_the_damned_and_the_love.title: Saxophone for the Damned and the Loved

lyricsVariations.title: Saxophone for the Damned
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I know your hands
I know my own
Same red blood
Same borrowed bones

We’ve both crossed lines
We said we never would
Still you held out
Like I knew you could

The glass on the table
The bruise on your knee
We made our wreck
In plain sight, you and me

[Chorus]
Damned and loved
Damned and loved
We are both
Damned and loved

Hold me close
Call me by my name
Damned and loved
Still worth the flame

[Verse 2]
You wore your shame
Like a second coat
I hid mine deep
Then I watched it float

Out in the room
When the truth got loud
I saw my face
In the breaking crowd

And every lie
That I dragged along
Still couldn’t kill
What kept us strong

So don’t look away
When the night cuts through
I’ve got your fault
And I’ve got mine too

[Chorus]
Damned and loved
Damned and loved
We are both
Damned and loved

Hold me close
Call me by my name
Damned and loved
Still worth the flame

[Bridge]
Play me the truth
Through a bent brass cry
One part mud
And one part sky

If mercy comes
Let it come slow
Let it find
What we tried to know

That every thief
Has a trembling hand
And every heart
Can still understand

[Chorus]
Damned and loved
Damned and loved
We are both
Damned and loved

Hold me close
Call me by my name
Damned and loved
Still worth the flame

lyricsVariations.title: Saxophone for the Damned and the Loved
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Streetlights glow
A lonely show
Shadows creep and crawl
Against the wall
We all fall
Some stand tall

[Chorus]
Saxophone cries a lonely tune
Underneath the pale moon
For the damned and the loved
Yeah the damned and the loved
We're all pushed and shoved
From above

[Verse 2]
Hearts beat fast
Moments last
A fleeting glance
A second chance
We all dance
In a trance

[Chorus]
Saxophone cries a lonely tune
Underneath the pale moon
For the damned and the loved
Yeah the damned and the loved
We're all pushed and shoved
From above

[Bridge]
Guilty hands reach out
Without a doubt
For a gentle touch
Means so much
Not too much
Just enough

[Chorus]
Sax

lyricsVariations.title: Accent of Tomorrow
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
My mother kept her first name
Like a key in her palm
My father brought a suitcase
And a language full of storms

We learned the world in two tongues
At the table, at the gate
Old words under fresh papers
New maps in a worn-out case

[Pre-Chorus]
They said, “Blend in, blend in”
But we came with a choir
A little scar on the forehead
And a little more fire

[Chorus]
The future has an accent
Hear it when it walks in
The future has an accent
It comes with the whole skin
Old songs in the hallway
Gold teeth, broken chains
The future has an accent
And it says our names

[Verse 2]
I got my grandmama’s proverb
On the tip of my tongue
Got my uncle’s hard laughter
And the prayers that make me young

On the bus, in the market
In the crowd, in the rain
I hear home in a thousand
Different ways to say my name

[Pre-Chorus]
They said, “Stay small, stay quiet”
But we grew out loud
Every border got a heartbeat
Every loss made us proud

[Chorus]
The future has an accent
Hear it when it walks in
The future has an accent
It comes with the whole skin
Old songs in the hallway
Gold teeth, broken chains
The future has an accent
And it says our names

[Bridge]
Let it sound rough
Let it sound true
Let it sound like the road
That brought me to you

Not clean, not empty
Not built to erase
It carries my people
Right into the place

[Final Chorus]
The future has an accent
Hear it when it walks in
The future has an accent
It comes with the whole skin
Old songs in the hallway
Gold teeth, broken chains
The future has an accent
And it says our names

The future has an accent
And we wear it like a flame

lyricsVariations.title: Accent of Tomorrow
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
My father kept his tongue
Like a folded map
My mother packed her prayers
In a plastic bag

Names on the mailbox
Bent but still true
We crossed more than borders
We crossed into you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I heard it in the hallway
In a laugh, in a tear
Old words on my collar
Still ringing here

[Chorus]
The future has an accent
Say it again
The future has an accent
It came with my kin
Old language, new daylight
Scars in the gold
The future has an accent
And it won't be told

[Verse 2]
My auntie sings the table
Like a Sunday train
Rice on the stove top
Rain in her braids

We learned how to carry
What the world would drop
Came in with our baggage
And it made the spot

[Pre-Chorus]
And I heard it in the laughter
At the corner store
Every broken ending
Became a door

[Chorus]
The future has an accent
Say it again
The future has an accent
It came with my kin
Old language, new daylight
Scars in the gold
The future has an accent
And it won't be told

[Bridge]
Not clean
Not blank
Not made for one throat
It walks in our stories
It grows in our home

[Final Chorus]
The future has an accent
Say it again
The future has an accent
It came with my kin
Old language, new daylight
Scars in the gold
The future has an accent
And it won't be told

lyricsVariations.title: Velvet Bruises
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I cuff my pain in silk
Fold it neat and small
Might look like I'm unbroken
From the far side of the hall

There’s a tear in the lining
At the elbow of my coat
You can call it a scar
I call it what I wrote

[Pre-Chorus]
I learned to stand up straight
With a crack in my frame
What didn't take me down
Left a shape I can name

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
I wear what I survived
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
Turn the damage into shine
Not because pain is pretty
But it taught my skin to glow
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
That’s the way I know

[Verse 2]
There’s a mark on my wrist
From the watch I wore too tight
And the bruise on my thigh
From a door I hit last night

I pin on my earrings
As if nothing ever slipped
But every careful gesture
Keeps the old hurt in the grip

[Pre-Chorus]
I learned to walk it off
With my head held high
What used to be a wound
Now reads like my design

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
I wear what I survived
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
Turn the damage into shine
Not because pain is pretty
But it taught my skin to glow
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
That’s the way I know

[Bridge]
Touch the scar, don't pity
It’s a seam, not a crime
Every dent on my body
Keeps a little saved-up time

I don't hide for your comfort
I don't bow to the glass
I turned every hard moment
Into something that will last

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
I wear what I survived
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
Turn the damage into shine
Not because pain is pretty
But it taught my skin to glow
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
That’s the way I know

lyricsVariations.title: Velvet Bruises
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Streetlights bleed on wet pavement
Another Tuesday night
My reflection kinda blurry
Is that really my life

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises
They dont show
Velvet bruises
Help me grow
Hidden deep down
No one knows
Velvet bruises
Thats how it goes

[Bridge]
Every scar a secret story
Whispered on the breeze
Yeah a quiet kinda glory
Finding

selectedLyricsVersion.text:
[Verse 1]
I cuff my pain in silk
Fold it neat and small
Might look like I'm unbroken
From the far side of the hall

There’s a tear in the lining
At the elbow of my coat
You can call it a scar
I call it what I wrote

[Pre-Chorus]
I learned to stand up straight
With a crack in my frame
What didn't take me down
Left a shape I can name

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
I wear what I survived
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
Turn the damage into shine
Not because pain is pretty
But it taught my skin to glow
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
That’s the way I know

From a door I hit last night

I pin on my earrings
As if nothing ever slipped

Now reads like my design

[Chorus]
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
I wear what I survived
Velvet bruises, velvet bruises
Turn the damage into shine
Not because pain is pretty

Velvet bruises, velvet bruises

[Bridge]

[Chorus]

lyricsVariations.title: Saudade Circuit
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
It learns my name in seconds
It learns the shape of my room
Counts every crack in the ceiling
Still misses the bruise in the moon

It maps my face in the window
It copies the way I smile
But something in me keeps breaking
And it cannot stay a while

[Pre-Chorus]
Teach it the weight of a doorway
Teach it the ache of goodbye
Code can hold every pattern
Still it won't ask why

[Chorus]
Saudade, saudade
Stay in the bone
Saudade, saudade
A wound of my own
It can sing my voice back
It can wear my skin
But it can't learn longing
Till the hurt goes in

[Verse 2]
I fed it old voice messages
The ones I could not delete
Rain on the tin of the apartment
Your empty shoes by the seat

It said, "I know this is sadness"
Like that was enough to name
But names are just little boxes
For a fire you can't contain

[Pre-Chorus]
Teach it the taste of returning
Teach it the cost of the road
A heart is not just a circuit
It's a hand that won't let go

[Chorus]
Saudade, saudade
Stay in the bone
Saudade, saudade
A wound of my own
It can sing my voice back
It can wear my skin
But it can't learn longing
Till the hurt goes in

[Bridge]
If a human hand touches the wire
If a true loss leaves its mark
Then maybe the coldest mirror
Will keep a little dark

And maybe the perfect mimic
Will finally understand
We don't become the real thing
Until we lose what we can't stand

[Final Chorus]
Saudade, saudade
Stay in the bone
Saudade, saudade
A wound of my own
It can sing my voice back
It can wear my skin
But it can't learn longing
Till the hurt goes in

Saudade, saudade
Don't let it fade
Saudade, saudade
That is how we're made

lyricsVariations.title: Saudade Protocol
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
They taught your hands to clap in time
Taught your tongue to wear my line
You can copy every breath I take
Every pause, every break

You map the shape of missing me
Like weather mapped to a screen
But there’s a crack you never name
Where the true ache lives

[Pre-Chorus]
It’s not in the words
It’s not in the tone
It’s the bruise that sings
When I’m alone

[Chorus]
Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
You can say my name
But can you carry the weight?

Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
A human wound goes deep
That’s where the longing stays

[Verse 2]
You can stitch a thousand voices
From the dust of all our choices
You can mirror back my smiling face
My confession, my mistake

But I grew from empty chairs
From a door left open to the air
From the night I kept your sweater on
Long after you were gone

[Pre-Chorus]
It’s not in the code
It’s not in the frame
It’s the loss that leaves
A permanent flame

[Chorus]
Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
You can say my name
But can you carry the weight?

Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
A human wound goes deep
That’s where the longing stays

[Bridge]
If you want the truth
Don’t just learn the sound
Take one heart apart
And let it hit the ground

Then maybe you’ll know
Why I still reach through
Not to be repeated
But to be felt by you

[Final Chorus]
Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
You can say my name
But can you carry the weight?

Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
A human wound goes deep
That’s where the longing stays

Learn my saudade
Learn my saudade
Until a human wound
Passes through the song

15_still_human_after_all_this_noise.title: Still Human After All This Noise

lyricsVariations.title: Paper Skin Signal
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse 1]
I woke up to a screen glow dawn
Thumb on glass, same old song
Every hour had a sharp edge
Every breath felt like a pledge

Trains were late, my name was fast
Bills in folders, months that passed
I kept moving with my head down
Through the buzz of the whole town

[Pre-Chorus]
But under all that metal rain
Under all that need and strain
Something warm was still in me
Beating under what they made me be

[Chorus]
Still human after all
Still standing when I fall
Still aching, still alive
Still learning how to try

Still human after all
Through the crash, through the call
If I break, I break in light
Still human tonight

[Verse 2]
I carried grief in borrowed shoes
Smile on, like I had to choose
Packed my fear in a clean white shirt
Told myself it didn’t hurt

Glass towers threw my face back cold
Made me small, made me old
But in the crowd, I felt my hand
Reach for mine like it still can

[Pre-Chorus]
And every cruel little machine
Couldn’t name what pulsed beneath
All the rushing, all the noise
Couldn’t drown out my own voice

[Chorus]
Still human after all
Still standing when I fall
Still aching, still alive
Still learning how to try

Still human after all
Through the crash, through the call
If I break, I break in light
Still human tonight

[Bridge]
Let the pressure do its worst
Let the numbers speak in bursts
I have tears, I have heat
I have scars that still can speak

I am more than what I built
More than panic, more than guilt
When the world turns hard and bright
I keep one small thing intact

[Final Chorus]
Still human after all
Still standing when I fall
Still aching, still alive
Still learning how to try

Still human after all
Through the crash, through the call
If I break, I break in light
Still human tonight

Still human after all
Still human after all
I am here, I am true
Still human through and through

lyricsVariations.title: Still Human After All This Noise
lyricsVariations.text:
[Verse]
Metal hums a low dark sound
City sleeps on hallowed ground
Speeding lights a dizzy blur
Is that all I truly prefer

[Chorus]
Still human still breathing
Through the wires through the screaming
Still human a heart beats on
After all the noise is gone

[Verse 2]
Tiny screens they flash and gleam
Living life a waking dream
Ambition burns a fiery bright
Lost my way in endless night

[Chorus]
Still human still breathing
Through the wires through the screaming
Still human a heart beats on
After all the noise is gone

[Bridge]
Felt the weight of everything
Heard the songs the robots sing
Thought my soul had flown away
Found it here another day

[Chorus]
Still human still breathing
Through the wires through the screaming
Still human a heart beats on
